title: Tum Hi Ho
chord_data:
[Am]Hum tere bin [F]ab reh nahi sakte
[C]Tere bina kya [G]wajood mera
[Am]Tujhse juda [F]gar ho jaayenge
[C]To khud se hi [G]ho jaayenge juda
[Am]Tum Hi Ho [F] [C] [G]

title: Kal Ho Na Ho
chord_data:
[C]Har ghadi [G]badal rahi hai [Am]roop zindagi
[F]Chhaon hai kabhi kabhi [C]hai dhoop zindagi
[C]Har pal yahan [G]ji bhar jiyo
[Am]Jo hai samaa [F]kal ho na ho

title: Channa Mereya
chord_data:
[Em]Acha chalta hoon
[G]Duaon mein yaad rakhna
[D]Mere dil ki dhadkan
[Am]Mujhe bhi zindagi mein [Em]aazma

title: Let Her Go
chord_data:
[C]Well you only need the [G]light when it's burning [Am]low
[F]Only miss the sun when it [C]starts to snow
[C]Only know you love her when you [G]let her go
[Am] [F] [C] [G]

title: Wonderwall
chord_data:
[Em7]Today is gonna be the day that they're gonna [G]throw it back to you
[Dsus4]By now you should've somehow realized [A7sus4]what you gotta do
[Em7]I don't believe that anybody [G]feels the way I do [Dsus4]about you now [A7sus4]

title: Hotel California
chord_data:
[Bm]On a dark desert highway [F#]cool wind in my hair
[A]Warm smell of colitas [E]rising up through the air
[G]Up ahead in the distance [D]I saw a shimmering light
[Em]My head grew heavy and my sight grew dim [F#]I had to stop for the night

title: Knockin' on Heaven's Door
chord_data:
[G]Mama take this badge off of me
[D]I can't use it anymore
[G]It's getting dark, [Am]too dark to see
[D]I feel I'm knockin' on [G]heaven's door
[G]Knock knock knockin' on [D]heaven's door
[G]Knock knock knockin' on [Am]heaven's door

title: Stand By Me
chord_data:
[A]When the night has come
[A]And the land is dark
[F#m]And the moon is the only [F#m]light we see
[D]No I won't [E]be afraid
[D]Oh I won't [E]be afraid
[A]Just as long as you stand [E]stand by me [A]
